scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build ./src/index.ts ./src/commands/run.ts ./src/commands/compare.ts ./src/commands/review.ts ./src/commands/init.ts ./src/commands/list.ts --target=node --outdir=dist --format=esm --sourcemap=linked --packages=external --root=./src && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && oclif manifest
